brandProfile.tone: Confident, authoritative, results-driven, aspirational, bold with specific numbers

do: Lead with specific numeric results (Raw 50, 99.95 ATAR, 45+ guarantee)
Feature real student credentials (Dux of MacRob, Melbourne High, etc.)
Use bright cyan (#7FE3FF) as the single accent color
Keep headlines to 3-5 words, confrontational or aspirational
dont: Use cinematic magazine editorial aesthetic (wrong register for teen audience)
Bake fake ATAR numbers or fake letter documents into AI props

visualSystem.approach: AI-generated lo-fi iPhone UGC photo background + HTML/Puppeteer composited typography. Never let AI render typography.
visualSystem.backgroundAesthetic: Lo-fi iPhone UGC, natural daylight (NOT cinematic, NOT golden hour). Authentic student-scroll feed aesthetic.
backgroundSubjects: Real student desk POV — open workbook with handwritten notes, highlighter, water bottle, pencil case
Dream outcome — graduation caps mid-air against bright sky, hands reaching up, NO visible faces, NO uni logos/crests
Acceptance / celebration moment — hands holding phone showing reactions (screen content composited separately)
visualSystem.accentWordPattern: Apply cyan accent to the final 1-2 words of the headline (e.g., 'Monash Medicine starts here.' → cyan on 'here.')

overlayGradient._note: Top overlay must be 0.95+ on bright daylight UGC backgrounds to keep white headline readable.

visualSystem.wordmarkStyle: Top-left, 54px top / 64px left. 'EdAtlas' in Inter 800, 22px, letter-spacing 0.22em, uppercase, 92% white. Followed by an 8px cyan (#7FE3FF) dot with a cyan glow shadow.
visualSystem.ctaStyle: Bottom-centered pill. Background #7FE3FF, text #04133A Inter 800 at 32px. Padding 26px 64px. border-radius 999px. box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(127,227,255,0.35), 0 4px 14px rgba(0,0,0,0.4). Brightest element on canvas.
visualSystem.subproofStyle: Below CTA, 20px gap. rgba(255,255,255,0.72), 18px Inter 500, letter-spacing 0.02em. One line max.
visualSystem.pipelineReference: /Users/lucentwu/Documents/Projects/Jarvis/output/edatlas-creatives-2026-04-12/composite.ts — the validated compositor lives here. Bg prompts in prompts/06-guarantee-lofi-bg.json and prompts/07-dream-grad-bg.json.

locked._note: Locked by ad-creative-generator after validated runs on 2026-04-12/13. Re-analysis via BetterYourAds will not overwrite these fields. Only an explicit relock action replaces this block.
